claim: V2 comfortably met the success bar on signup_completed.
finding: Hedge-promotion: 'comfortably' asserts more confidence than the underlying CI supports (p=0.059 just clears the 0.05 threshold). The adverb is doing rhetorical work the data does not authorise.
remediation: Drop 'comfortably' or replace with the literal CI bound. Calibrate the adverb to the actual margin.
